nodes.name: Slender antbird
nodes.summary: Slender antbird（Slender antbird，学名 Rhopornis ardesiacus），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，主要分布于Caatinga，常见栖息地包括灌丛，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: Caatinga
nodes.summary: Caatinga是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联56种鸟类，包括白腹拟䳍、黄腿穴䳍、White-browed guan等56种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It also is found in the ecotones between that biome and both more humid forest and caatinga scrublands

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It also is found in the ecotones between that biome and both more humid forest and caatinga scrublands

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is primarily threatened by habitat destruction associated with livestock farming. Though its nominal total range covers about , it actually inhabits areas totaling less than .Luiz, E.R., dos Santos, S.S., Flores, F.M., Zorzin, G., Ferreira, H.M., Camurugi, E., de Carvalho, H.D.S
